---
title: "groupCcode"
format: html
---

What can be done to improve this code?

`#create a vector of the numbers 1 through 25`{style="color: green"}

`a<-c(1,25)`

`#create another vector from the same data but multiplied by 7`{style="color: green"}

`a * 7`

`#add the 8th and 16th item in the vector`{style="color: green"}

`b(8) + b(16)`
